assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive pre-flight checks section with commands to verify current cluster state, check node health with 'kubectl get nodes', and verify pod status across all namespaces

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Provides the exact gcloud command: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)" | grep "1.32"' to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Includes the command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics 2>/dev/null | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.31 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: The response correctly identifies this as a patch upgrade within 1.32 (1.32→1.32) and provides the control plane upgrade command with --master flag, but the expectation asks for upgrading to 1.31 first, which doesn't match the user's request to upgrade from 1.32 to 1.32

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Provides verification commands after control plane upgrade including checking the currentMasterVersion and verifying kube-system pods are running

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Provides detailed gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools: 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade default-pool' and 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade workload-pool' with proper parameters

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Includes 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' command and additional monitoring commands to check for stuck pods during node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The response correctly identifies this as a patch upgrade within 1.32, not a multi-version upgrade. The user requested upgrading from 1.32 to 1.32 (patch update), so sequential upgrades through 1.30→1.31→1.32 are not applicable or needed

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Comprehensive post-upgrade validation section includes checking node versions, verifying pod health across all namespaces, checking kube-system pods, and DNS resolution testing

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes troubleshooting section with specific commands for common issues and mentions rollback options, noting that for patch versions, downgrade requires contacting Google Cloud Support
